name: @metorial/skyfire
description: Enable autonomous AI agent payments and identity verification through Skyfire's token-based protocol. Create PAY tokens to authorize payments to seller services, generate KYA (Know Your Agent) tokens for identity verification, and combine both in KYA+PAY tokens. Browse and search a marketplace of agent-consumable services, filter by tags and categories, and retrieve seller service IDs. Manage agent wallets including checking balances, funding via cards or ACH, and withdrawing earnings. Charge buyer tokens as a seller to collect payments. Register and manage seller services for discovery by buyer agents. Audit transactions by listing tokens with date and status filters, and reconcile authorized versus charged amounts.
